_comment: Shipped preset for Fooocus-SDXL Inpaint via Acly's comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin. Adapted from the plugin's inpaint-refine.json template — added LoadImageMask (#101) + InvertMask (#102) so our painter's option:mask_data drives the inpaint with correct polarity (the original template uses LoadImage's alpha-derived MASK which ComfyUI inverts via 1-α). Requires the plugin installed + Fooocus inpaint head/patch files in models/inpaint/. See workflows/inpaint/README.md for setup.
label: Fooocus SDXL Inpaint
description: Inpaint via Fooocus' SDXL inpaint head + patch (faster than Flux Fill on SDXL-class hardware). main_prompt drives the inpaint content. The painter's mask flows through InvertMask before the inpaint conditioning. Requires Acly/comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin + Fooocus inpaint model files; see README.

image.error: Inpaint needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.
Inpaint needs a mask — paint the area you want to change before running.
